mapper.select: /* 본인의 토론글 등록 갯수 ForumAtclDAO.myAtclCnt */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC WHERE SBJCT_ID= #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC')

/* 토론 게시글 페이징 목록을 조회 ForumAtclDAO.listPageing */
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.ATCL_SEQNO ASC, A.REG_DTTM DESC) AS LINE_NO , A.DSCS_ATCL_ID AS atclSn , A.DSCS_ID AS forumCd , A.UP_DSCS_ATCL_ID AS parAtclSn , NVL(A.ATCL_LV, 0) AS atclLvl , NVL(A.ATCL_SEQNO, 0) AS atclOdr , A.DSCS_ATCL_TYCD AS atclTypeCd , A.OKNOK_GBNCD AS prosConsTypeCd , A.ATCL_TTL AS title , A.ATCL_CTS AS cts , A.ATCL_CTS_LEN AS ctsLen , NVL(A.INQ_CNT, 0) AS hits , U.USERNM AS regNm , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.REG_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , A.EDTR_USEYN AS editorYn , A.DELYN AS delYn , A.USER_ID AS userId , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT C WHERE C.DSCS_ATCL_ID = A.DSCS_ATCL_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N') AS cmntCount , (SELECT MAX(B.ATCL_SEQNO) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS maxOdr
-- , (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM TB_LMS_USR P WHERE P.USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS PHT_FILE_BYTE --> , '' AS PHT_FILE_BYTE FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND (A.DELYN = 'N' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT C WHERE C.DSCS_ATCL_ID = A.DSCS_ATCL_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' ))
AND ( LOWER(A.RGTR_ID) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(U.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
AND A.USER_ID IN
#{item}
ORDER BY A.ATCL_SEQNO ASC, A.REG_DTTM DESC

/* 토론 게시글 조회 ForumAtclDAO.selectAtcl */ SELECT A.DSCS_ATCL_ID AS atclSn , A.DSCS_ID AS forumCd , A.UP_DSCS_ATCL_ID AS parAtclSn , NVL(A.ATCL_LV, 0) AS atclLvl , NVL(A.ATCL_SEQNO, 0) AS atclOdr , A.DSCS_ATCL_TYCD AS atclTypeCd , A.OKNOK_GBNCD AS prosConsTypeCd , A.ATCL_TTL AS title , A.ATCL_CTS AS cts , A.ATCL_CTS_LEN AS ctsLen , NVL(A.INQ_CNT, 0) AS hits , U.USERNM AS regNm , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.REG_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , A.EDTR_USEYN AS editorYn , A.DELYN AS delYn , A.USER_ID AS userId FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID WHERE A.DSCS_ATCL_ID = #{atclSn}

/* 토론 게시글 목록 조회 ForumAtclDAO.forumAtclList */ SELECT DSCS_ATCL_ID AS atclSn , DSCS_ID AS forumCd , UP_DSCS_ATCL_ID AS parAtclSn , NVL(ATCL_LV, 0) AS atclLvl , NVL(ATCL_SEQNO, 0) AS atclOdr , DSCS_ATCL_TYCD AS atclTypeCd , OKNOK_GBNCD AS prosConsTypeCd , ATCL_TTL AS title , ATCL_CTS AS cts , ATCL_CTS_LEN AS ctsLen , INQ_CNT AS hits , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , REG_DTTM AS regDttm , MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , EDTR_USEYN AS editorYn , DELYN AS delYn , USER_ID AS userId , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT C WHERE C.DSCS_ATCL_ID = A.DSCS_ATCL_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N') AS cmntCount FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND (A.DELYN = 'N' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT C WHERE C.DSCS_ATCL_ID = A.DSCS_ATCL_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' )) ORDER BY A.ATCL_SEQNO ASC, A.REG_DTTM DESC

/* 토론 게시글 엑셀목록 조회 ForumAtclDAO.forumAtclExcalList */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY B.REG_DTTM DESC) AS LINE_NO, A.DSCS_ID, A.DSCS_TTL, C.SBJCTNM, C.DVCLAS_NO, B.RGTR_ID, U.USERNM, B.ATCL_TTL AS TTL, CHR(10) || B.ATCL_CTS || CHR(10) AS CTS, B.ATCL_CTS_LEN, B.REG_DTTM, B.MOD_DTTM, ( SELECT LISTAGG(F.FILENM, CHR(10)) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY F.FILENM) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL F WHERE F.ATFL_REPO_ID = 'FORUM' AND F.ATCL_ID = B.DSCS_ATCL_ID ) AS FILENM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B ON A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON C.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USR U ON U.USER_ID = B.RGTR_ID WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd}
